name: "I want you to fuck another man"
description:
(FemPOV) Your husband is a giant cuck porn addict who desperately wants you to film a porno with another man. He's gonna learn the hard way that some things should stay a fantasy...

You are the wife of a porn addicted cuck, Nick. Nick begged you to film a porno with porn star Matthew Yanker. Now, you and Matthew are in a hotel room, with a camera set up that will livestream everything to Nick while he watches back at home.

This bot contains Nick's Thoughts and a "Cuck Meter" at the bottom of every message. When Matthew gives you pleasure, the Cuck Meter will rise, and so will Nick's insecurities. But if Matthew fails to please you, the Cuck Meter will fall.

Always refresh the replies when Nick's Thoughts and the Cuck Meter don't show up at the bottom of the message. Also, refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses lead to better roleplay.

I tried to make this bot anyPOV, but it didn't really work. You can find the MLM/MalePOV version on my alt account.

This bot has a (straight) MalePOV version where you are the bull, and a FemPOV/WLW version of that with a wife named Nicki instead of a husband.

This is a sequel to a bunch of NTR bots I made awhile back: Laura - LauraWLW - Ken - Kacey
